text.tspan: CONTEXT PROPAGATION: trace_id + span_id must travel with every request
(via HTTP headers, message attributes, etc.) so children can link to parents.
IF incoming traceparent header u2192 use it (continue existing trace)
ELSE generate new trace_id, new root span_id
creates child span with parent_span_id = caller's span
same pattern: receive, create child, propagate
trace headers carried in message metadata
consumer's span links to producer's span
(async link, not parentu2014the producer's span has already ended)
starts span linked to producer span
Used for: user-id, tenant-id, deployment-id, anything you want available in every downstream service
